column2: Verify Remote Pilot Competency Using Implemented FSTD
column3: ['Confirm that an implemented Flight Simulation Training Device (FSTD) is available for use by remote pilots. ', 'Observe remote pilots using the provided FSTD to practice their skills. ', 'Confirm that the operator assesses and records the competency of each remote pilot after they have used the FSTD. ']
column4: ['The operator can provide evidence of the existence and implementation of an FSTD. ', 'Remote pilots are actively engaging with the FSTD, demonstrating that they are utilizing it for training purposes. ', "The operator can provide evidence of their assessment and recording process for each remote pilot's competency following their use of the FSTD. "]
